feed.title: MagicDecisions Blog
feed.subtitle: Making better decisions with practical tools and psychology insights

entry.title: The Psychology Behind Decision Fatigue
entry.summary: Why do we struggle with simple choices? Learn about cognitive load and how randomization tools can help preserve mental energy.
entry.content: Why do we struggle with simple choices? Learn about cognitive load and how randomization tools can help preserve mental energy.

entry.title: When to Use Randomness vs Logic
entry.summary: Not every decision needs deep analysis. Discover when it makes sense to let chance decide and when to think it through.
entry.content: Not every decision needs deep analysis. Discover when it makes sense to let chance decide and when to think it through.

entry.title: 10 Decisions You Should Never Overthink
entry.summary: From what to eat for dinner to who drives—some choices deserve quick decisions, not hours of deliberation.
entry.content: From what to eat for dinner to who drives—some choices deserve quick decisions, not hours of deliberation.

entry.title: The Science of Randomness
entry.summary: How computers generate random numbers and why true randomness matters for fair decision-making tools.
entry.content: How computers generate random numbers and why true randomness matters for fair decision-making tools.

entry.title: Breaking Analysis Paralysis
entry.summary: When you have too many options and cannot choose, a random selector can be your best friend. Here's why.
entry.content: When you have too many options and cannot choose, a random selector can be your best friend. Here's why.
